description: The BMW M1, produced from 1978 to 1981, was BMW's first and only mid-engined supercar. Designed by Giorgetto Giugiaro and powered by a 3.5-litre straight-six producing 277 bhp, just 453 road cars were built. Originally intended for Group 4 homologation, it remains one of the rarest and most desirable BMWs ever produced.
